_comment: Claude_up MCP 基线配置片段 — 合并到 settings.json 的 mcpServers 字段
_doc: 安装命令：claude mcp add <name> --scope user <command> [args...]

filesystem._install: claude mcp add filesystem --scope user npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem D:\MoonzWorkspace

playwright._install: claude mcp add playwright --scope user npx @playwright/mcp@latest

context7._install: claude mcp add context7 --scope user npx @upstash/context7-mcp@latest
